brain.commentary: Council output is mixed: index longs (DIA, QQQ, SPY) are the healthiest signals with low vol and positive composites, while single-name tech is mostly flat with negative alpha (MSFT, META, TSLA notably weak). Crypto is uniformly negative with high vol and deeply negative alpha — no reason to fight that. QQQ's long call is fragile: conviction 0.607 rests almost entirely on momentum with near-zero alpha (0.0058) and 1.4 beta, so I trim it. NVDA and TSLA are flagged fragile due to beta ~2.0 with negative composites; any long exposure there should be minimal. AAPL and DIA are the most defensible l

counsellors.nvidia: Overall, the portfolio is tilted toward high‑beta tech and crypto, raising volatility well above the market baseline. Consider modestly reducing beta exposure and adding low‑vol
